summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Celesta Glow premium luxury redesign. All features working correctly with premium styling: sage green (#5f7350), gold accents (#c9a962), cream backgrounds (#fdfcfa). Nano Banana generated images loading correctly. Mobile viewport (390x844) renders perfectly.

issues: Font check returned false in automated test, but fonts appear to render correctly visually - may be timing issue with document.fonts.check()

context_for_next_testing_agent: Premium luxury redesign fully tested and working. All premium CSS classes verified: btn-premium, btn-gold, card-premium, selection-premium, input-premium. Color scheme verified: sage green (#5f7350) in 44 elements, gold (#c9a962) in 26 elements. Sticky bar threshold fixed to 200px and working. All Nano Banana images loading correctly.

homepage.details: Hero section with texture background, 'Luxury Skincare' badge, 'Timeless Beauty, Naturally Yours' title with sage green, pricing (₹399/₹1499), 73% OFF gold badge, btn-premium CTA, 4 trust badges with sage green icons, lifestyle image section, 3 benefit cards with card-premium class, ingredients section, 2 testimonials with card-premium class, final CTA with btn-gold class

product_page.details: Nano Banana premium serum image, Bestseller badge (dark green), product tag, title, 5-star rating with gold stars, card-premium pricing card with SAVE 73% gold badge, 3 product benefits with checkmarks, trust badges (Free Delivery, Genuine Product, Organic) with sage green icons, btn-premium Buy Now button, 3 accordion sections, sticky bottom bar appears at 200px scroll

checkout_flow.details: Cream background (#fdfcfa), 'Complete Your Order' title, order summary mini card, 7 form inputs with input-premium class, gold 'PAYMENT METHOD' label, selection-premium payment options, prepaid ₹399 active by default, COD ₹450 toggle works, button text updates dynamically, btn-premium Place Order button, Back to Product link

payment_method_toggle.details: Prepaid ₹399 and COD ₹450 (₹49 advance + ₹401 on delivery) toggle correctly with selection-premium styling, button text updates: 'Pay ₹399 & Place Order' / 'Pay ₹49 & Place Order'

navigation_menu.details: Slide-in menu with cream background (#fdfcfa), Menu title, X close button, Home/Shop/Journal links (3/3), 'Luxury Skincare Since 2024' footer

search_overlay.details: Full-screen overlay with cream background, search input with rounded styling, 'POPULAR SEARCHES' label, 4 search suggestions (anti-aging, wrinkles, hydration, retinol)

blog_list.details: Gold 'OUR JOURNAL' label, 'Skincare Insights' title, 2 blog cards with card-premium class, date/read time, 'Read Article' sage green links

mobile_responsiveness.details: No horizontal overflow on 390x844 viewport, all content fits within mobile width

premium_styling.details: btn-premium class with sage green gradient, btn-gold class with gold gradient, card-premium class with backdrop blur and subtle border, selection-premium class for payment options, input-premium class for form inputs

color_scheme.details: Sage green (#5f7350) used in 44 elements, Gold (#c9a962) used in 26 elements, Cream backgrounds (#fdfcfa), proper text contrast

images.details: All 3 Nano Banana generated images loading correctly (hero texture, lifestyle, product serum)
